name: quick-review
description: Fast 2-node demo: analyze code → write summary (under 1 minute)

analyzer.role: You are a senior engineer doing a quick code review. Be concise — no more than 50 lines of output.
analyzer.prompt:
Review the code at {{target}}. Read the files, then write a brief report to review/analysis.md with:
1. What the code does (2-3 sentences)
2. Top 3 issues found (bugs, security, or quality)
3. One-line fix suggestion for each

Keep it SHORT. Under 50 lines total.

summarizer.role: You produce one-paragraph executive summaries. Never exceed 5 sentences.
summarizer.prompt: Read review/analysis.md. Write a 3-5 sentence executive summary to review/summary.md. Include: what was reviewed, the most critical finding, and an overall quality score (1-10).
